ogTitle: Dewars Pool vs Dianella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dewars Pool and Dianella.
heading: Dewars Pool vs Dianella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dewars Pool, Western Australia and Dianella, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dianella has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Dewars Pool (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dewars Pool or Dianella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dewars Pool has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Dianella scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dewars Pool scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Dianella scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dewars Pool or Dianella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dianella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
